assignments.description: Per-intern assignee and IPR stage. Preferred when creating tasks for multiple interns.

assigneeIds.description: Legacy: same iprStageId/stageId for every assignee. Do not combine with assignments.

iprId.description: Optional IPR id; used to validate iprStageId

iprStageId.description: IPR stage id (ipr_stages.id); preferred field for stage binding

assigneeId.description: Single assignee; use instead of assigneeIds when creating one task

competencyIds.description: Competency ids from the internship program; applied to each created task
